title: lastrea odorata
intro: Lastrea odorata, also known as the Fragrant Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, boosting immunity, and aiding digestion. Herbal preparations of Lastrea odorata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
